title: Rafael's CopperCraft
description: Simple and to the point, showing that the mod enhances copper’s role.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/304bd6170a382ea507e1b9e649eb295d5892fdd1.png)
### Version 0.0.1 - Unlock the Power of Copper!

**Copper Craft** is a Minecraft mod that brings copper to the forefront of your adventures. In this early release, version 0.0.1, we’re starting with the basics to give copper the practical role it deserves. This mod is perfect for players looking to utilize copper beyond decorative blocks and oxidized monuments.

---

## Features in Version 0.0.1

### Copper Tool Pack
- Craft a full set of copper tools, including:
  - Pickaxe
  - Axe
  - Shovel
  - Hoe
  - Sword
- These tools have durability and efficiency between stone and iron, making them a great intermediate resource.

### Copper Armor Set
- Forge a complete set of copper armor for added protection.
- Unique copper visuals and durability to help you survive longer in early-game adventures.

---

> *Note: This is an initial release, so stay tuned for more features and enhancements as Copper Expanded continues to evolve!*

---

#### Why Copper?
Copper has untapped potential in Minecraft, and **Copper Craft** unlocks it, adding purpose to every block you mine, smelt, and craft.
